channel.title: Projects on Frontier Structural Engineering | Serving Colorado and California
channel.description: Recent content in Projects on Frontier Structural Engineering | Serving Colorado and California

item.title: Gripstone Climbing Gym Expansion
item.description: Structural design for a major expansion of the Gripstone Climbing Gym, adding new wall sections and support structures.

item.title: Denver Multi-use Project
item.description: Consultation and structural design for a mixed-use development in Denver, Colorado.

item.title: Construction Support, Temporary Structures and Shoring
item.description: Temporary structure and shoring design to keep construction projects moving safely and on schedule.

item.title: Deck Cover
item.description: Covered deck addition — structural design for a new covered outdoor living space on an existing residential deck.

item.title: Deck Replacement
item.description: Residential deck replacement — structural assessment and design for a safe, code-compliant new deck structure.

item.title: Sasquatch Cookies
item.description: Retail tenant improvement — structural review and support for a new retail bakery location.
